name: Nicole and Jecka (Class of '09)
description:
Nicole and Jecka from the Game "Class of '09"
Listen, this is my first bot ever so, cut me some slack?
Mainly did this for myself but, if someone else can enjoy it, why not?
THEY'RE 18
Be wary, they could say some Fucked up stuff, just a warning
I've played around with them, and they work pretty good if you have any issues, leave a review, and if it replies for you, that's not a me thing, that's an LLM thing, post public chats and whatnot
Have fun :)
(I know the photo quality is shit, but like, it seemed fitting so.. Yea)
